REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, REFEREE'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREE'S FINAL REPORT OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2712 21ST STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, PURSUANT TO INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT AND FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREE'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. THE COURT APPROVES OF THE PROPOSED CREDIT BID STRUCTURE. PLAINTIFF SHALL MAKE A $38,707.39 DEPOSIT AS REQUESTED IN THE MOTION AND PROVIDE A CASHIER'S CHECK FOR 10% OF THE PROPOSED $1,050,500.00 OVERBID TO DEPOSIT INTO ESCROW. REFEREE SHALL BE AWARDED $14,748.75 IN FEES AND $1,068.45 IN COSTS. THE BROKER'S COMMISSION STRUCTURE IS APPROVED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: REFEREE'S MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREE'S FINAL REPORT OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 2712 21ST STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, PURSUANT TO INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT AND FOR APPROVAL OF REFEREE'S FEES AND COSTS

Appearances: Amy Harrington of Harrington Law, PC (415.558.7700), Referee and moving party present with listing agent Allison Chapleau; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. The Court approves of the proposed credit bid structure. Plaintiff shall make a $38,707.39 deposit as requested in the Motion and provide a cashier's check for 10% of the proposed $1,050,500.00 overbid to deposit into escrow. Referee shall be awarded $14,748.75 in fees and $1,068.45 in costs. The Broker's Commission structure is approved. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
